commands: which git || (echo '[ERROR] git is not installed. Install it and retry.' && exit 1)
which xz  || (echo '[ERROR] xz-utils is not installed. Install it and retry.' && exit 1)
which tar || (echo '[ERROR] tar is not installed. Install it and retry.' && exit 1)

wget -q --show-progress -O fx.tar.xz 'https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/${gameversion}/fx.tar.xz' || (echo '[ERROR] Artifact download failed. Check your gameversion value.' && exit 1)
tar -xJf fx.tar.xz --no-same-owner 2>&1 || (echo '[ERROR] Extraction failed. The downloaded artifact may be corrupt.' && exit 1)
echo '[FiveM] Cloning cfx-server-data for base resources...'
git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/citizenfx/cfx-server-data.git cfx-server-data-tmp 2>&1 || (echo '[ERROR] Failed to clone cfx-server-data.' && exit 1)
echo '[FiveM] Moving base resources into place...'

commands.text:
# =============================================================================
# FiveM / FXServer Configuration
# Generated by PufferPanel FiveM Template
# Docs: https://docs.fivem.net/docs/server-manual/setting-up-a-server-vanilla/
# =============================================================================

# --- Network Endpoints ---
# Bind the server to a specific IP and port. 0.0.0.0 = all interfaces.
endpoint_add_tcp "${ip}:${port}"
endpoint_add_udp "${ip}:${port}"

# --- Server Identity ---
sets sv_hostname "${servername}"
sets sv_projectName "${servername}"
sets sv_projectDesc "${serverdesc}"
sets tags "${tags}"
sets locale "${locale}"

# --- Player Slots ---
# Maximum concurrent players. OneSync is required for values above 32.
sv_maxclients ${maxclients}

# --- OneSync ---
# Enables accurate entity/player streaming beyond 32 slots.
# Values: on | off | legacy
set onesync ${onesync}

# --- Game Build ---
# Pin clients to a specific GTA V DLC build. Requires matching server artifact.
# See: https://docs.fivem.net/docs/server-manual/server-commands/#sv_enforcegamebuild
set sv_enforceGameBuild ${gamebuild}

# --- Security ---
# Prevent clients using ScriptHookV from connecting (recommended: 0).
sv_scriptHookAllowed ${allowscripts}

# --- Privacy ---
# Hide player IP addresses from other clients and external log output.
sv_endpointPrivacy ${hideendpoints}

# --- Server Icon (96x96 PNG, placed in server-data/) ---
${servericonline}

# --- RCON (Remote Console) ---
# Uncomment and set a strong password to enable RCON access.
# rcon_password "${rconpassword}"

# --- Logging ---
set sv_logFile "server.log"

# --- Steam Web API (optional) ---
# Enables Steam authentication. Leave as "none" to disable.
set steam_webApiKey "${steamWebAPI}"

# --- License Key (REQUIRED) ---
# Obtain your key at: https://keymaster.fivem.net
sv_licenseKey "${licensekey}"

# =============================================================================
# Resources
# Use 'ensure' to start and keep a resource running.
# =============================================================================
ensure mapmanager
ensure chat
ensure spawnmanager
ensure sessionmanager
ensure hardcap
ensure baseevents

# --- Custom Resources (add yours below) ---
# ensure my-resource

# =============================================================================
# Permissions (ACE)
# Add admin identifiers below. Find your identifier via: net_steamId or license.
# Example: add_principal identifier.license:XXXXXXXX group.admin
# =============================================================================
add_ace group.admin command allow
add_ace group.admin command.quit deny

commands: echo '  1. If using txAdmin: start the server WITHOUT +exec to trigger txAdmin setup.'
echo '  2. If using vanilla mode: verify server-data/server.cfg is correct, then start.'
echo '  3. Open port ${port} (TCP+UDP) and 40120 (TCP) on your firewall.'
echo '  4. Ensure your license key is set in server-data/server.cfg.'

ip.desc: IP address for the server to listen on. Use 0.0.0.0 to bind to all network interfaces.

port.desc: Port for the FiveM server (TCP + UDP). Default is 30120. Open this port in your firewall.

gameversion.desc: FiveM Linux artifact version to install. Find the latest recommended build at https://runtime.fivem.net/artifacts/fivem/build_proot_linux/master/ (e.g. 7290-abc123def456). Use 'latest' is not valid here — always paste an exact build string.

licensekey.desc: Your FiveM server license key from https://keymaster.fivem.net — required to start the server.

servername.desc: The name displayed in the FiveM server list.

serverdesc.value: A FiveM server powered by PufferPanel
serverdesc.desc: Short description of your server, shown in server details.

tags.desc: Comma-separated tags to help players find your server in the browser.

locale.desc: Server locale for display and sorting in the server list (e.g. en-US, fr-FR, de-DE).

maxclients.desc: Maximum number of concurrent players. Values above 32 require OneSync to be enabled.

onesync.desc: Enable OneSync for improved player/entity streaming and >32 player support. Values: on | off | legacy.

gamebuild.desc: GTA V DLC game build to enforce on connecting clients. See https://docs.fivem.net/docs/server-manual/server-commands/#sv_enforcegamebuild for valid values.

allowscripts.desc: Allow clients with ScriptHookV to connect. Set to 0 (recommended) to block mod menus. Set to 1 to allow.

hideendpoints.desc: Hide player IP addresses from other clients and server list. Strongly recommended for player privacy.

steamWebAPI.desc: Steam Web API key for optional Steam authentication. Set to 'none' to disable. Obtain at https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey

servericonline.desc: Optional: set to 'load_server_icon myicon.png' (96x96 PNG placed in server-data/) to show an icon in the server list. Leave blank to disable.

rconpassword.desc: RCON password for remote console access. Leave blank to keep RCON disabled (recommended unless needed).

txadminargs.desc: txAdmin launch arguments. Controls the server profile name and txAdmin web panel port (default 40120). To run in vanilla mode without txAdmin, set this to '+exec server-data/server.cfg'.

startupextra.desc: Any additional custom startup arguments appended to the launch command.
